theme_archetype.rationale: Spotify's core aesthetic revolves around an immersive, deep dark mode that makes colorful album art and bright green playback actions pop. We are elevating this with 'Jewel & Luxury' (matte, cinematic blacks instead of flat grays) and 'Performance Pro' (sharp, highly legible data grids for artist statistics).

rules.hover_states: Hover states on surfaces should use #1A1A1A. Hover on primary buttons should deepen the green to #1DB954 while text remains #000000 for contrast.
rules.no_gradients: Avoid large generic gradients. Use subtle background noise or radial light bleeds using the primary color at 10% opacity in corners for depth.

rules.anti_default: Never use Inter for headings. Keep headings tightly tracked.
rules.contrast: Ensure secondary text (#A7A7A7) passes WCAG AA against the #121212 background.

dashboard_grid.strategy: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID

surface_strategy.cards: Flat background (#121212), sharp 1px border-white/10. No dropshadows. Rely on border contrast.
surface_strategy.navigation: Solid #0A0A0A background with right border border-white/10.
surface_strategy.player_bar: GLASSMORPHISM: sticky bottom-0 bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border-t border-white/10 z-50 p-4

buttons.primary: Rounded-full bg-[#1ED760] text-black font-bold px-8 py-3 hover:scale-105 hover:bg-[#1DB954] transition-all duration-200
buttons.secondary: Rounded-full bg-transparent border border-[#A7A7A7] text-white font-bold px-8 py-3 hover:border-white transition-colors duration-200

tables.structure: Use Shadcn Table. Remove all column borders, retain subtle row bottom borders (border-white/5).
tables.hover: Row hover should highlight with bg-white/5. Add a Play icon appearing on hover for song rows.

charts.styling: Use #1ED760 for primary area/line charts. Use a gradient fill (from #1ED760 at 30% opacity to transparent) under the line. Hide standard grid lines, use only subtle Y-axis ticks.

modals.upload: Use Shadcn Dialog. Overlay must be bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm. Dialog window bg-[#121212] border border-white/10.

motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Framer Motion: fade in and translate-y-4 for the main dashboard wrapper.
motion_and_interactions.list_stagger: Songs list and dashboard cards must stagger in (0.05s delay per item).

micro_interactions.play_button: Pulsing animation when song is actively playing.
micro_interactions.hover_card: Dashboard bento cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) with a border transition to border-white/20 on hover.

hero_backgrounds.description: Dark cinematic background texture with glowing neon green soundwave light bleed. Use as a subtle background behind the main dashboard header or artist profile header.

avatars.description: Music producer in studio. Use for the logged-in artist's profile picture.
Person at computer. Use for comments, fan list, or secondary avatars.

album_covers.description: Green and purple abstract light. Use as album art in the Songs Table or Player.
Vivid blue and red swirls. Use for top-performing track.
Blue and purple geometric abstract. Use for recent uploads.

instructions_to_main_agent.setup: Install libraries: `yarn add framer-motion recharts lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge`.
instructions_to_main_agent.fonts: Import 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' via Google Fonts in index.css. Apply Manrope to the body, and Outfit to heading classes.
instructions_to_main_agent.icons: Use lucide-react for all standard icons. Make sure playback controls (Play, Pause, Skip) use fill where appropriate (e.g., filled triangle for Play).
instructions_to_main_agent.structure: Create a layout with a fixed left Sidebar (w-64) and a main content area. Add a fixed bottom Player Bar if a song is playing.
instructions_to_main_agent.routing: Ensure dynamic switching between Artist Dashboard (Stats), Songs List, Fan Browse, and Admin tables.
instructions_to_main_agent.components: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for layout containers. Use customized Shadcn for Table, Dialog (Upload Modal), and Select.
instructions_to_main_agent.strict_rules: DO NOT use placeholders like via.placeholder.com. Use ONLY the URLs provided in `image_urls`. Use data-testid attributes on all buttons and actionable items.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: All text must pass WCAG AA against its background. Hover states must have text color explicitly set to avoid disappearing text.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_ids: Every button, input, tab, and song row MUST have a `data-testid` (e.g., `data-testid='upload-song-button'`, `data-testid='play-song-1'`).
